title: lobelia djurensis
intro: Lobelia djurensis, also known as Chinese lobelia or Chinese pukeweed, is a plant species belonging to the Lobelia genus, native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Lobelia djurensis include relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Lobelia djurensis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds and promote overall well-being.
